title: satureja exigua
intro: Satureja exigua, also known as the mountain savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Satureja exigua include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Satureja exigua can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to food as a culinary herb, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
